Clarion Housing Association
Customer Services, 6 More London Place, London, SE1 2DA

8 March 2026

Dear Resident,

REPAIR REQUEST ACKNOWLEDGEMENT — REF: CLR-2026-44821

Thank you for reporting the repair required at your property. We have logged your request for a replacement kitchen tap at 42 Cowley Road, Oxford, OX4 1HZ.

A member of our repairs team will contact you within 5 working days to arrange a convenient appointment. This repair has been classified as a routine repair and will be completed within 28 days in line with our repairs policy.

If your repair becomes urgent or you have not heard from us within 5 working days, please contact our customer services team on 0300 500 8000, Monday to Friday 8am to 6pm.

We apologise for any inconvenience caused.

Yours sincerely,
Customer Services Team
Clarion Housing Association
